Remove branding, audio newsletters, up to 10 publications, unlimited team seats, priority support
Up to 10K subscribers, visual automations, paid newsletters, 3.5% + 30c transaction fee
Unlimited subscribers, advanced analytics, deliverability reporting, newsletter referral system
Paid subscriptions, custom themes, 8K+ integrations, 0% transaction fee, 1K members
15 staff users, priority support, higher limits, early access features

StockRanks scoring (0-100), 35K global stocks, QVM methodology, portfolio analytics, screeners

Algorithmic trading strategies, backtesting, learning academy, example strategies
Merchant of record, sales tax/VAT handling, license keys, subscriptions, bundles, global payments

Usage-based pricing, no monthly fees, tiered by model capability
API access, webhooks, integrations, Send API (Max tier)

recommendations.rationale: Competitive with beehiiv Scale ($43) and Kit Pro ($66). Position at premium end: Ghost ($29) is minimum viable, but AI-enhanced content justifies higher. Milk Road model: free daily + premium signals. Target serious investors willing to pay for alpha.

Stockopedia charges ~€29-40/month for rankings. AlgoCloud starts at $10. Position between them: Basic at €19 (accessible), Pro at €49 (premium with AI-enhanced signals, backtesting, portfolio tracking). 60% cheaper than Stockopedia Pro, 4x AlgoCloud basic.
recommendations.expected_impact: +€1,900/month at 100 Basic subscribers OR +€4,900/month at 100 Pro subscribers

recommendations.rationale: OpenAI usage-based model works. Twelve Data charges for API access. Alternative data has value—Fear & Greed, whale signals, anomaly detection. Freemium: 100 calls free, then pay-per-use. Developers and quant traders will pay for clean, aggregated data.

Gumroad/Lemon Squeezy ecosystem supports this. Research reports have value—crypto deep dives, stock analysis, automation guides. Price by depth: €9 quick reports, €29 detailed analysis, €79 complete bundles. No platform fee with own checkout.

Cross-sell opportunity. Subscribers to one service are high-intent for the other. Bundle creates stickiness and increases LTV. 24% discount is standard (competitors offer 15-30% on bundles). Annual option: €590/year (2 months free).
recommendations.expected_impact: +40% higher LTV per bundle subscriber vs individual subscriptions

pricing_experiments.test: Freemium Threshold: Free tier vs 7-day trial vs paid-only
pricing_experiments.success_metric: Conversion rate to paid, total revenue, subscriber growth rate
Average revenue per user (ARPU), tier selection distribution

pricing_experiments.success_metric: Annual plan adoption rate, cash flow improvement

pricing_experiments.test: API Pricing: Pay-per-call vs monthly unlimited
pricing_experiments.success_metric: API usage, revenue stability, developer satisfaction

pricing_experiments.test: Bundle Urgency: Limited-time bundle vs permanent bundle
Dynamic Pricing: Regional pricing (€19 EU vs $19 US)
pricing_experiments.success_metric: Conversion rate by region, total revenue by region

competitive_gaps_opportunities.underpricing_risk: Currently not monetizing - zero revenue is 100% underpricing vs market
differentiation_opportunities: Multi-asset coverage (crypto + stocks vs crypto-only or stock-only)
European focus (GDPR compliant, Euro pricing, EU market focus)

freemium_optimization.recommended: Free: 1 signal/week + delayed data. Paid: Real-time + unlimited + AI insights
freemium_optimization.conversion_levers: Scarcity (limited free spots), value demonstration (7-day full access), loss aversion (price increases for new subscribers)

phase_1_quick_wins: Set up Lemon Squeezy for digital products

summary.biggest_opportunity: AI-enhanced signals bundle - under-served market with clear willingness to pay
summary.key_insight: Competitors charge $10-66/month for single services. Bundle differentiation + AI positioning allows premium pricing at €59/month while staying competitive.
